title: Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences
content:
Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences

Strategy Lab

MENU

Finance and Strategy Labs, established in 2015-2016 academic year with the help of İş Yatırım, empowers our faculty in terms of applied academic education. On the other hand, in terms of strategic management, Strategy Lab provides students several simulative environments in order for they could enhance decision making capacities regarding several strategic business areas such as international trade, production planning&management, marketing, finance, human resource management, competition and international supply chain management.
